symbols: rider with lance on rearing horse — the Christian warrior battling evil
serpent or dragon beneath — the defeated power of evil
description: An expressionist painting in bright, bold colors showing an abstracted mounted figure on an orange horse, wielding a long lance. The horse rears dramatically against a background of soft yellows and pastel colors. Below, a curving blue-green serpentine form suggests the dragon. The style is highly simplified and modernist with flat planes of vivid color — orange, blue, pink, green, and yellow. The composition is dynamic and upward-moving.
